name: Hamburger Gravey
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop several onions—about two large or three medium—and finely chop the ground chuck (ground chuck or leaner).
2. Heat a skillet over medium heat and scramble/brown the hamburger and onions together, ensuring the meat stays finely chopped to avoid clumps.
3. Once the meat is cooked through and onions are translucent, remove excess grease, leaving about one tablespoon in the skillet.
4. Sprinkle two tablespoons of water over the mixture and stir well on low to medium heat.
5. Add approximately one cup and a half of water, stirring until blended. Optionally, add a bouillon cube.
6. Simmer while stirring until the gravy thickens.
7. Season with pepper (and salt if needed) to taste. Keep warm as potatoes finish boiling for enhanced flavor.
